Re-run Power Conversion?

This will delete every current row in your Powers, Equipment, Vehicles, and Headquarters sections that was created by migration, then re-run conversion against the Legacy Archive. Any manual edits you've made to migrated rows will be lost. Use this only if your initial conversion was incomplete or produced incorrect output.

Clear All Legacy Data?

This will permanently delete every row in your legacy Powers, Equipment, Vehicles, and Headquarters sections. The pre-3.0 archive will be gone. Use this only after you've verified your migrated data in the new builder and don't need the archive for reference.
